ops.title: Campaign close-out 2026-07-19/20: experiments E15–E29, exposure surfaces, acceleration, instrument program
ops.body:
One-day parallel campaign (plan "think-of-some-more-delightful-mist", user-approved scope "everything, training included"). Every metric verdict below was issued under the instrument card decision rule and independently recomputed by a verify lane. Total new LLM+training spend ≈ $145.

## Shipped to main (all CI green)
- **adae1e31** — seven exposure surfaces: `cc-steer evidence / import / profile / exemplars / stats / predict` + token-guarded dashboard (default bind 127.0.0.1; `--host 0.0.0.0` behind per-run token). The cc-merge/cc-factory integration points. Ported across the operator's cc-transcript v14.6 migration mid-flight.
- **328f82f9** — enrich per-pair failure isolation (EnrichError, MAX_CONSECUTIVE_FAILURES=5, EnrichReport.failed).
- **prompt-cache restructure** (in flight at close-out; WF-A item 2, measured 31.7% cheaper/row, equivalence gate passed): JUDGE/AUDIT/REFINE static blocks → system prompt via `cached_judge`; versions triage 6→7, audit 5→6, refine 3→4; JUDGE semantics stay exactly v6 per the E19.B null. **The bumps re-judge the corpus (~5776 rows) — expected, loud, and doubles as E20's recommended free re-labeling of the gpt-5.5 noise pocket.**

## Instrument program (the campaign's core finding set)
- **Instrument card v1.1** at `~/.cc-steer/experiments/instrument-card-v1.{md,json}` (ledger 384378de3; supersedes note b35bae5). Unpaired MDE 0.0453 (n=628) / 0.0303 (n=1325); paired path with measured rho 0.70–0.86 → practical MDE 0.017–0.024. The whole P6 sweep arm ranking reclassified under-powered.
- **Headline defect**: deployed pairwise panel judge is a constant decider (J=0) — golden-gated promotion currently uninformative (backlog task d5cfd966).
- **Bias factors measured (E16)**: binary is_steering clean for length/position/style; one tentative flag — style paraphrase on category labels (+8.1pp, CI touches 0).
- **Judge fulcrum (E16/E18/E19/E25 triangulated)**: unreliability concentrates at the operational_directive↔direction boundary and it is DEFINITIONAL — E19's GEPA loop produced boundary rules (c003-m2) that validated NULL on a 125-row contested panel (E19.B: delta −0.008, McNemar p=1.0, trades errors across strata). v6 contested-stratum accuracy: 0.800.

## Experiment verdicts (ledgers carry full protocols/artifacts)
- E15/E15X/E15Y noise floor + MDE — card foundation. E17 J=0. E18 reliability strata + never-pool-cross-prompt-version rule.
- E20: confident learning fails as an auto-cleaner; noise pocket = gpt-5.5-labeled rows. E21: session-correlation ESS 4019 (of 6731). E26 probe: small-edit-distance shape confirmed → DPO/DPOP/KTO bake-off killed before spend.
- E27 CAA steering vectors: ACTIONABLE **degradation** −0.0254 (first delta ever resolved on these frames; paired DeLong, rho 0.865) — rejected on merit. E28 clean-label+weighted retrain: within noise floor (−0.0128). E22 retrieval-in-context: null. E23 mechanical hook compilation: fails (3/14 rules; LLM-gated hooks are the path).
- E24: 2018-decision AskUserQuestion dataset (mirror corpus) + baselines; difficulty floor = option-0 prior 0.574. E29 FT: beats every baseline, cannot separate from the floor at n=202; best calibration on record (gate not met → no promotion; predict.py stays evidence_only).

## Open decisions for the operator
1. **Stage limits** (WF-A item 3, ledger 556d952f2): recommended TRIAGE 300 / REFINE 200 under an ASSUMED 15M-opus/night budget — needs the real subscription cap confirmed before applying (~440 triage rows post-cache-ship).
2. Backlog tasks filed: paired-DeLong production port (1367beec), panel judge fix (d5cfd966), judge-call baseline strip — likely the biggest remaining cost win (aade0a1c), clean 429 sweep (73b8deb2), DPO degenerate-pair filter (789ac8d9).

Workspaces exp0/exp1/prep removed; wfs/wfa removed after the cache ship lands. Snapshot `_base-20260719` retained (read-only) as the campaign's frozen input state.
